title: Analytics - Device Added
scenario: Log an event with device name, PID, and serial number upon successful device pairing, and verify default dashboard elements display correctly.
steps: Verify that an event is logged for the successful pairing.
Check that the logged event includes the device name, device PID, and device serial number.
Confirm the dashboard displays a graph.
Confirm the dashboard shows events in the last 30 minutes.
Confirm the dashboard shows event count by country.
Confirm the dashboard shows event count by gender.
Confirm the dashboard shows events per session.
Confirm the dashboard shows app version.
Confirm the dashboard shows app build.
Confirm the dashboard shows app environment.
Note that event counts may take a few hours to update.
expected: An event is logged with device name, device PID, and device serial number. The default dashboard displays a graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
